comment.body:
so what i wrote in the weekly post is basically this:

1) monthly positioning is short vanna = vol up is squeezish, vol down is suppressive (in simple terms)
2) vomma supply = any vol spikes is doomed to be sold. so vol is moderated anyway.
3) based on momentum, vol some negative imbalance, that it will rebalance at some point.
A vol spike would create a blowoff top.. 6350/60 (me personally don't see 6400 now)
4) but the vol spike would be sold... now... here is the twist:
- the positioning has long zomma = so vol up increases the gammas even in the shorter-term tenors. This means, that into the July OpEx that is a long speed (short gamma down, long gamma up), positioning, the vol effect would leave increased upside gamma behind.
- depending on the spot the market is trading at, it can be a) stabilizing, b) suppressive. 
(both is possible, i don't see the levels yet)

5) after the gamma unclench occurs, vol can grind slowly higher.
this would make the market a) either ranging, if it is hgih enough, b) slowly grinding down, in februar stlye

comment.body:
don't try to explain every move logically.
if it could be so, market would be predictable, and this would depend only on the knowledge of the analyst if he can predict that or not...

you have the level.
level means a strucutre/dynamics/environment within certain events are possible.
if the level is broken, the structure and the dynamics changes
